description: The Moran family is a Melbourne-based Australian criminal family involved in drug trafficking, corruption, money laundering, and debt collection. Founded by Lewis Moran in the 1970s, the family was heavily involved in the Melbourne gangland killings, a feud that resulted in over 30 deaths from 1998 to 2010. Key members include matriarch Judy Moran, who was convicted of murder in 2011. The family is allied with the Carlton Crew and rivals with the Williams Gang.
